title: Shareholder-Owned Business Spotlight: Ryan Tape Anchor
summary: BSNC would like to highlight the innovative achievements of BSNC shareholder Henry “Hank” Ryan. Ryan is the inventor of the “Ryan Tape Anchor,” a weighted device designed to improve the use of a tape measure. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 29, 2024
summary: February 29, 2024: The sea ice has decreased this week at a pretty small rate of 0.27% (as opposed to last week’s growth rate of 1.46%), from the level on 02/22/2024 of 14.823 M km 2 to 14.783 M km 2 for this week. So, perhaps we are right on the precipice of the change to the sea ice melt season. P...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 26 February, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 26 February, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Empowering Alaskan Entrepreneurs: The Alaska State Small Business Credit Initiative
summary: After its first successful year, there is no question that the Alaska State Small Business Credit Initiative (SSBCI) program stands out. Not only because it is located in one of the most stunning states and serves an incredibly diverse community, but its administrative lead, the Alaska SBDC, is the only Small Business Development Center (SBDC) in the nation to do so. Alaska SBDC is a partner program of the University of Alaska Anchorage Business Enterprise Institute (BEI) and housed under it, Alaska SSBCI stimulates...
